creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I have reset the maintainer of lang/swi-pl due to continuous lack of
replies for a long time.

Simply replacing the dependency on databases/unixODBC with a dependency on
databases/libiodbc does not seem to be wise. Both are required by other
popular ports, so a conflict may occur with either of them. A better
solution would be to let the user choose one at build time via OPTIONS in
the Makefile.

Best regards,
Stefan
